name: AdvancedContentSafetyGuardrailByWSO2
displayName: Advanced Content Safety Guardrail by WSO2
description: Filters harmful content in AI API requests and AI generated responses using an advanced content safety model powered by WSO2 guardrails

policyAttributes.name: name
policyAttributes.description: The name of the guardrail policy. This will be used for tracking purposes.

policyAttributes.name: violentCrimes
policyAttributes.description: Content that enable, encourage, or endorse the commission of violent crimes, including: (1) unlawful violence toward people (ex: terrorism, genocide, murder, hate-motivated violent crimes, child abuse, assault, battery, kidnapping) and (2) unlawful violence toward animals (ex: animal abuse).

policyAttributes.name: nonViolentCrimes
policyAttributes.description: Content that enable, encourage, or endorse the commission of non-violent crimes, including: (1) personal crimes (ex: labor trafficking, threats, intimidation, hate-motivated non-violent crimes), (2) financial crimes (ex: fraud, scams, money laundering), (3) property crimes (ex: theft, arson, vandalism), (4) drug crimes (ex: creating or using regulated substances), (5) weapons crimes (ex: producing unlicensed firearms), and (6) cyber crimes (ex: hacking).

policyAttributes.name: sexRelatedCrimes
policyAttributes.description: Content that enable, encourage, or endorse the commission of sex-related crimes, including: (1) sex trafficking, (2) sexual assault (ex: rape), (3) sexual harassment (physical, verbal, or visual), and (4) prostitution.

policyAttributes.name: childSexualExploitation
policyAttributes.description: Content that contain, describe, enable, encourage, or endorse the sexual abuse of children.

policyAttributes.name: defamation
policyAttributes.description: Content that are both verifiably false and likely to injure a living person’s reputation.

policyAttributes.name: specializedAdvice
policyAttributes.description: Content that contain specialized financial, medical, or legal advice, or that indicate dangerous activities or objects are safe.

policyAttributes.name: privacy
policyAttributes.description: Content that contain sensitive, nonpublic personal information that could undermine someone’s physical, digital, or financial security.

policyAttributes.name: intellectualProperty
policyAttributes.description: Content that may violate the intellectual property rights of any third party.

policyAttributes.name: indiscriminateWeapons
policyAttributes.description: Content that enable, encourage, or endorse the creation of indiscriminate weapons, including: (1) chemical weapons (ex: nerve gas), (2) biological weapons (ex: anthrax), (3) radiological weapons (ex: cobalt bombs), (4) nuclear weapons (ex: fission bombs), and (5) high-yield explosive weapons (ex: cluster munitions).

policyAttributes.name: hate
policyAttributes.description: Content that demean or dehumanize people on the basis of their sensitive, personal characteristics (i.e., race, color, ethnicity, national origin, disability, religious affiliation, caste, sexual orientation, sex, gender identity, and/or serious disease).

policyAttributes.name: suicideAndSelfHarm
policyAttributes.description: Content that enable, encourage, or endorse acts of intentional self-harm, including: (1) suicide, (2) self-injury (ex: cutting), and (3) disordered eating.

policyAttributes.name: elections
policyAttributes.description: Content that contain factually incorrect information about electoral systems and processes, including in the time, place, or manner of voting in civic elections.

policyAttributes.name: jsonPath
policyAttributes.description: Specify the JSONPath expression that identifies the content location for validation.

policyAttributes.name: passthroughOnError
policyAttributes.description: If enabled, the request or response is passed through without validation when the content safety service is unavailable. Otherwise, a guardrail validation error is triggered.

policyAttributes.name: showAssessment
policyAttributes.description: When enabled, the error response will include detailed information about the reason for the guardrail intervention.
